_instructions.usage: Fill in every field below with real project data, then seed it with: npx tsx scripts/seed-from-json.ts path/to/this-file.json
rules: Do NOT remove any key — if unknown, leave as null or empty string.
Leave image/document storage_url and url as empty string '' — add via admin Media panel

project.name: ATS Homekraft Happy Trails
project.address: Plot No. GH-02A, Sector 10, Greater Noida West, Uttar Pradesh 201306
project.tagline: A Heavenly Abode in Lush Greens
project.description: Premium G+27 ready-to-move residential community by ATS Homekraft featuring 80% open green landscape and excellent 130m road access.
project.long_description: ATS Homekraft Happy Trails is one of the most iconic premium ready-to-move-in residential projects located in Sector 10, Noida Extension. Developed by the highly trusted ATS Homekraft (ATS Greens), the project spans 8.59 acres of land. It comprises 12 majestic high-rise towers rising up to G+27 floors, housing a total of 1,239 apartments. Built to high specifications, the project stands out for its green landscape design, dedicating over 80% of its area to expansive lawns, pathways, and beautiful horticulture. Designed by renowned international architects, the project offers highly functional 2 BHK and 3 BHK apartments, with a key focus on privacy and ventilation (featuring only two apartments per floor in select towers). Equipped with a central clubhouse, adult and kids swimming pools, professional-grade squash and lawn tennis courts, and three-layer advanced security, Happy Trails provides a perfect, secure, ready-to-register family home.
marketing_claims: Professional Lawn Tennis, Squash & Badminton Courts
Strategic 130m Wide Noida Extension Road Frontage

builder.name: ATS Homekraft
builder.company_overview: ATS Homekraft is the premium-segment subsidiary of the highly acclaimed ATS Infrastructure Limited (established in 1998). Guided by founder Getamber Anand, ATS has delivered thousands of iconic homes across Noida and Greater Noida. Recognized for consistent structural layouts, signature Spanish architectural designs, and outstanding horticulture landscapes, ATS Homekraft represents trust, transparency, and top-tier construction values in NCR.

unit_types.name: 2.5 BHK + Study (Comfort)
unit_types.subtitle: Comfort 2.5 BHK with dedicated study
unit_types.description: Thoughtfully planned 2.5 BHK configuration offering a dedicated study/WFH office room, 2 fully fitted bathrooms, modular kitchen setups, vitrified floor tile finishes, and double balconies overlooking the central lush landscapes.
whats_included: Separate study room / home office ducting

unit_types.name: 3.5 BHK + Study (Elite)
unit_types.subtitle: Spacious family 3.5 BHK layout
unit_types.description: Elite 3.5 BHK configuration boasting 3 spacious bedrooms plus a study room, 3 fully pre-fitted washrooms, premium tile flooring, modular woodwork setups, and three expansive balconies providing direct garden views.
whats_included: Anti-skid tiles in bathrooms and balconies

connectivity.name: National Highway 24 (NH-24)
connectivity.notes: 15 minutes drive to Ghaziabad and Delhi boundaries

assumptions: GST is 0% because project is fully completed and delivered.
Stamp duty of 6% is as per Uttar Pradesh circle rates.

payment_plan.notes: Offers immediate bipartite registry clearance on 100% payments.

decision_profile.decision_thesis: ATS Homekraft Happy Trails is the premier, ready-to-move-in green residential safe haven in Sector 10, Noida Extension.
why_buy: Unbeatable green layout with over 80% open landscaped area and premium horticulture.
Excellent construction pedigree of ATS Greens, with Spanish architectural design aesthetics.
Zero delivery risk with completed handovers, active flat registries, and 0% GST.
why_avoid: Sustaining premium horticulture and sports courts results in slightly higher monthly maintenance charges.
Resale pricing has appreciated significantly, trading at a premium to standard developers.
decision_profile.best_for: Working families and IT professionals desiring ready ready-to-move-in green living with elite sports infrastructure.
decision_profile.not_ideal_for: Buyers looking for low-cost, high-density budget flats under Rs 1 Cr.

buyerPersonas.headline: Lush Greens & Sports
reasons: 80% open landscapes with professional squash, tennis, and badminton.
Completed ready-to-move status with active bipartite flat registries.

investment_insights.appreciation_desc: Consistent appreciation driven by ATS brand trust and sector maturity.
investment_insights.rental_desc: High rental demand from corporate executives working in Noida's IT hubs.
investment_insights.market_desc: Highly stable micro-market with low ready supply.
investment_insights.liquidity_desc: Premium ready-to-move units sell within 30-45 days.

persona_profile.risk_appetite: Conservative - demands delivered, legally clean assets
persona_profile.family_stage: Established nuclear families with school-going kids
persona_profile.work_location: Noida IT corridors and corporate Expressway hubs
persona_profile.motivation_note: Aspirations for immediate, secure moving, excellent sports facilities, and premium green environments for parents.

recommendation_profile.primary_thesis: A spectacular ready-to-move green residential development. Developed by ATS Greens, Happy Trails delivers premium Spanish-style design, robust structures, and excellent sports courts.
recommendation_profile.end_use_thesis: Best-in-class ready living. Walk directly into a completed, beautifully landscaped society with full amenities active.
recommendation_profile.investment_thesis: Outstanding capital preservation play. Proximity to Noida's 130m road and the upcoming metro ensures steady future asset appreciation.
recommendation_profile.family_thesis: Highly recommended. Pedestrian-safe stilt design keeps toddlers completely protected from vehicles.
recommendation_profile.investor_thesis: Defensive asset with stable rental yields and fast exit options in the HNI buyer pool.
recommendation_profile.luxury_thesis: Good quality architecture with grand entrance lobbies and premium modular specifications.
recommendation_profile.risk_thesis: Zero delivery risk. Bipartite flat registrations are active under UPRERAPRJ15574.
negotiation_leverage: Resale competition from multiple towers allows hard pricing negotiation on mid floors.
recommendation_profile.timeline_advice: Act immediately if a registered unit is available at around ₹11,500/sqft. completed premium assets in Sector 10 are highly coveted.

competitors.this_project_advantage: Spanish design theme with much wider green landscaping (80% open) and professional-grade squash courts.
competitors.competitor_advantage: Slightly cheaper per sqft price positioning.
competitors.verdict: Choose ATS Happy Trails for premium brand trust and lush green landscapes; choose Arihant Abode for smart concrete construction.
competitors.price_delta_note: ATS Happy Trails trades at a premium of approx ₹1,500/sqft to Arihant Abode.
